login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your member portal.
login.resetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
login.resetEmailRequired: Please enter your email address to reset password.
login.heroSubtitle: Welcome back to your co-living portal. Manage payments, report issues, and stay connected with your community.
login.easyBillingDesc: Pay rent and track invoices seamlessly.

dashboard.acRunning: AC has been running for {hours}h today.
dashboard.allSet: Everything is set for your stay.
dashboard.usageSummary: {used}h used this month out of {free}h free allowance

billing.title: Billing & Payments
billing.subtitle: Manage your rent payments and AC usage charges.
billing.lateFees: Late fees are accruing at SGD {amount}/day

onboarding.personalDesc: Tell us a bit about yourself so we can set up your tenancy profile.
onboarding.idDesc: We need to verify your identity. Scan your ID or upload a photo.
onboarding.signDesc: Review and sign your Tenancy Agreement to confirm your room booking.
onboarding.depositDesc: Pay your security deposit to secure your room at Hyve.
onboarding.houseRulesDesc: Read and acknowledge our community house rules before moving in.
onboarding.moveInDesc: Everything you need to know for a smooth move-in day.
onboarding.checklistDesc: Record the condition of your room at move-in for your protection.
onboarding.completeDesc: You're all set. Here's a quick guide to help you settle in and make the most of your stay.
onboarding.skipNote: You can sign the agreement later from your Documents page
onboarding.notFoundDesc: Your onboarding record could not be found. Please contact Hyve support.
onboarding.allSet: You're all set! Welcome to Hyve.
onboarding.guideDashboardDesc: Track your AC usage, rent status, and manage everything from one place.
onboarding.guideRentDesc: Rent is due on the 1st of each month. Pay via bank transfer or card in the Billing section.
onboarding.guideIssuesDesc: AC not working? Leaky tap? Report maintenance issues and we'll handle it ASAP.
onboarding.guideDocumentsDesc: View your tenancy agreement and upload documents like stamping certificates.
onboarding.guideHelpDesc: WhatsApp us anytime at +65 8088 5410 or email hello@hyve.sg. We typically respond within an hour.

issues.title: Need Help?
issues.myIssuesSubtitle: Track and manage your reported maintenance requests.
issues.noIssuesDesc: Everything looking good? If something needs attention, let us know.
issues.selectCategory: Let's try to fix it first. Select what's wrong.
issues.trySteps: Try these steps before submitting a ticket.
issues.didntWork: The self-help steps didn't resolve it — let us know the details.
issues.skipSelfHelp: Skip self-help — I need to report this now
issues.withdrawConfirm: Are you sure you want to withdraw this request?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal details, email, and password.
settings.setupEmailDesc: You're currently using a temporary login. Add your real email to receive important notifications.

documents.title: My Documents
documents.subtitle: View your agreements and upload documents like stamping certificates.
documents.heading: Documents

deposit.verifiedDesc: Your security deposit has been received and verified.
deposit.pendingDesc: Your bank transfer proof has been submitted. Admin will verify within 24 hours.
deposit.proofSubmitted: Payment proof submitted — pending admin verification.

houseRules.acknowledge: I acknowledge and agree to the house rules
houseRules.beingFinalised: House rules are being finalised. Please check back shortly.

moveIn.readThrough: Here's everything you need to know for a smooth move-in. Please read through before continuing.
moveIn.needHelpDesc: WhatsApp us anytime at +65 8088 5410 or email hello@hyve.sg. We typically respond within an hour.
moveIn.readAck: I've read the move-in instructions and understand the house guidelines.
moveIn.keyCollectionDesc: Collect your keys from the property manager on your move-in date. Bring your IC/passport for verification.
moveIn.accessEntryDesc: Your room key and main door access will be provided. Digital lock codes (if applicable) will be set up during key collection.
moveIn.wifiDesc: Network: Hyve WiFi. Password: Thehyve2027@. Router is in the common area.
moveIn.laundryDesc: Washing machine is in the common area. Please use it between 8am–10pm. Detergent is not provided.
moveIn.cleaningScheduleDesc: Common areas are cleaned weekly. Keep shared spaces tidy after use. Cleaning supplies are under the kitchen sink.
moveIn.wasteRecyclingDesc: Dispose of rubbish in the bins at the designated area. Separate recyclables where possible.
moveIn.airConditioningDesc: Your AC usage is tracked. The first 300 hours/month are included in rent. Additional usage is charged at S$0.30/hour.
moveIn.rentPaymentDesc: Rent is due on the 1st of each month via bank transfer. Details are in your Billing page. Late fees apply after the 5th.
moveIn.maintenanceDesc: Report any issues via the portal (Issues page). For emergencies, WhatsApp us at +65 8088 5410.
moveIn.communityDesc: Be respectful of your housemates. Quiet hours are 10pm–8am. Guests are welcome but overnight stays need prior notice.

checklist.instructions: Check each item in your room and note its condition. Take photos of any existing damage — this protects your deposit.

agreement.loadFailed: Failed to load agreement. Please try again.
agreement.beingPreparedDesc: Your licence agreement is being prepared. Admin will upload it shortly. Check back here once you receive a notification.
agreement.beingProcessed: The document is being processed. Please check back shortly.
agreement.waitingCounterDesc: The Hyve team will countersign your agreement shortly. You'll receive an email once it's fully executed.
agreement.fullyExecutedDesc: Both parties have signed. Your tenancy agreement is legally binding.

tour.welcomeText: Let us show you around. This quick tour will help you get familiar with everything.
tour.dashboardText: Your home base. See your AC usage, rent status, announcements, and quick stats all in one place.
tour.documentsText: View your tenancy agreement, upload stamping certificates, receipts, and other important documents.
tour.billingText: Track your rent payments, see outstanding balances, and view payment history. Rent is due on the 1st of each month.
tour.issuesText: Something broken? Report maintenance issues here. We'll try to help you fix it first with our self-diagnostic tool.
tour.settingsText: Update your personal details, change your password, or set up your email address.
tour.helpText: WhatsApp us anytime at +65 8088 5410 or email hello@hyve.sg. We typically respond within an hour. Enjoy your stay!

receipt.computerGenerated: This is a computer-generated receipt. No signature required.

ticket.withdrawFailed: Failed to withdraw request. Please try again.

checkout.activeDesc: Your tenancy is active. Contact your house captain or admin to initiate checkout.

idVerification.residencyQuestion: Are you a Singaporean/PR or Foreigner?
idVerification.foreignerNotice: As a foreigner, you need to upload both your passport and your work pass.
idVerification.scanSuccess: Document scanned — please verify the details.
idVerification.scanFailed: Scan failed — please fill in the details manually.
idVerification.docExpiredDesc: Your {docType} has expired. You cannot proceed with an expired document. Please provide a valid document or contact your employer for renewal.
idVerification.docExpiringSoonDesc: Your {docType} expires on {date}. Please ensure you renew it before expiry. The management team will be notified.
idVerification.workPassDesc: Upload your valid work pass in addition to your passport above.
idVerification.passExpiredDesc: Your {passType} has expired. You cannot proceed with an expired pass. Please contact your employer for renewal.
idVerification.passExpiringSoonDesc: Your {passType} expires on {date}. Please ensure you renew it. Management will be notified.
idVerification.frontRequired: Please upload a photo of the front of your ID.
idVerification.passNumberRequired: Pass number is required for foreigners.
idVerification.passPhotoRequired: Please upload a photo of your pass (Work Permit / EP / S Pass).
idVerification.passportExpired: Your passport has expired. Please provide a valid document.
idVerification.passExpiredError: Your pass has expired. Please provide a valid document.

hero.title: Find your perfect co-living space in Singapore
hero.subtitle: Premium furnished rooms from S$950/month. All bills included.
hero.whyHyveSubtitle: We've stripped away the friction of traditional renting to focus on what matters: your experience.
hero.communityFirstDesc: Curated resident events, shared spaces, and a digital community designed to turn neighbors into lifelong friends.
hero.sereneDesignDesc: Thoughtfully designed interiors that balance private acoustic sanctuaries with vibrant, light-filled social hubs.
hero.allInclusiveDesc: WiFi, utilities, cleaning, maintenance — everything handled through our resident concierge. Just move in.
hero.featuredSubtitle: Our curated coliving spaces across Singapore.
hero.ctaSubtitle: Join a community of professionals and creatives living intentionally. All-inclusive. No stress.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you.
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our coliving spaces?
contact.subject: Subject
